content: What is the probability distribution for BTC-USD in 14 trading days? Use the Markov distribution methodology with terminal threshold markets only. If valid horizon-matched anchors are missing, abstain instead of estimating buckets.

abstainReasons: No trusted terminal prediction-market anchors are available for this horizon.
Out-of-sample Markov R² is -0.104, so the model does not beat a historical-mean baseline.
